project_not_found_solution: Run `eket-cli project:init` to initialize the project, or ensure you are in the correct project directory
config_not_found_solution: Run `eket-cli project:init` to create configuration, or check .eket/config.yml exists
next_step_start_instance: Next step: Run /eket-start to begin execution
task_not_found_solution: Run `eket-cli task:claim` to see available tasks, or verify the task ID format (e.g., FEAT-123)
task_claim_instruction: Use /eket-claim <id> to claim specific task, or /eket-claim auto for auto claim
task_assigner_unavailable: Task assigner unavailable, using local assignment
claim_task_examples:
Examples:
  $ eket-cli task:claim                         # Show available tasks
  $ eket-cli task:claim FEAT-123                # Claim specific task
  $ eket-cli task:claim auto                    # Auto claim highest priority
  $ eket-cli task:claim -a -r frontend_dev      # Auto claim with role
claim_task_related:
Related Commands:
  $ eket-cli task:list                          # List all tasks
  $ eket-cli instance:start                     # Start instance
  $ eket-cli submit-pr                          # Submit PR
master_already_exists: Master already exists, this instance will run as Slaver
election_won: Election won, this instance becomes Master
webserver_redis_warning: Redis connection failed, some features may be unavailable
webserver_sqlite_warning: SQLite connection failed, some features may be unavailable
